title: OCI Network Security Group Updated
description: Detects updates to Network Security Groups (NSGs).
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.updatenetworksecuritygroup' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.addnetworksecuritygroupsecurityrules')))
